title: Colony PCR
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"oa3h","text":"This PCR method can be used to screen for inserted target genes or DNA sequencing analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"8lr9k","text":"Please wear gloves for the experiment,  don't try to touch the lid after PCR program initiation. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Pick colonies as the template for colony PCR. The number picked for each plate depends on the difference between the positive and negative controls. %s %s Fill the rest with water.
Test digest performed and products analysed using agarose gel electrophoresis to confirm if correct construct was present.
Use colony PCR to enlarge colony numbers. Then only the positive clones were mini-prepped.
